chunks.title: Vision of the Lord at the Altar
chunks.reason: A prophetic vision describing judgment on the temple and the inescapable reach of God's wrath.

chunks.title: The Lord's Power and Sovereignty
chunks.reason: A speech emphasizing Yahweh's control over nature and history, including the comparison to other nations.

chunks.title: Oracle of Destruction and Preservation
chunks.reason: An oracle declaring the destruction of the sinful kingdom while preserving a remnant of Jacob.

chunks.title: Restoration of David's Dynasty
chunks.reason: A prophetic blessing detailing the future restoration of Israel and the land.
